Name: UMaterialExpressionSingleLayerWaterMaterialOutput
Description: Material output expression for writing single layer water volume material properties.

Variables.Name: ScatteringCoefficients
Variables.Description: Input for scattering coefficient describing how light scatter around and is absorbed. Valid range is [0,+inf[. Unit is 1cm.

Variables.Name: AbsorptionCoefficients
Variables.Description: Input for scattering coefficient describing how light bounce is absorbed. Valid range is [0,+inf[. Unit is 1cm.

Variables.Name: PhaseG
Variables.Description: Input for phase function 'g' parameter describing how much forward(g>0) or backward (g<0) light scatter around. Valid range is [-1,1].

Variables.Name: ColorScaleBehindWater
Variables.Description: Input for custom color multiplier for scene color behind water. Can be used for caustics textures etc. Defaults to 1.0. Valid range is [0,+inf[.
